channel.title: Home on Susan Corpuz
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Susan Corpuz

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Hello! I’m Susan

I’m a multidisciplinary documenter, weaving research, storytelling, and visual work.

Skills

  • Documentation, Photography, Illustration
  • Web Development
  • Design
  • Problem Solving

Background

Susan is a Filipino artmaker, writer, and researcher whose work traverses the intersection of visual culture, political critique, and historical inquiry. Trained in Fine Arts at the University of the Philippines Diliman and currently pursuing a master’s degree in Art History, she blends academic rigor with a realist artistic practice grounded in watercolor and oil painting.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Get In Touch

I’d love to hear from you! Feel free to reach out.

Contact Information

Email: me@susancorpuz.com
Location: Philippines

Social Links

  • GitHub
  • LinkedIn
  • Instagram

Send a Message

For inquiries, please send me an email at me@susancorpuz.com

Looking forward to connecting with you!

item.title: Fieldnotes
item.description:
Fieldnotes

A collection of thoughts, observations, and insights from my work and explorations.

Latest Notes

Coming soon…

Check back for updates on my latest projects, learnings, and reflections.

item.title: Projects
item.description:
My Work

Here are some of my recent projects:

Project 1: Website Redesign

A modern portfolio website built with Hugo and PaperMod theme. Technologies: Hugo, HTML, CSS

Project 2: Mobile App

A responsive mobile application for task management. Technologies: React, JavaScript, Firebase

Project 3: Open Source Contribution

Contributed to several open-source projects. Technologies: Python, JavaScript

Project 4: Product Design

Mass manufactured facemasks using textile handwoven by women of Kalinga.

item.title: Resume
item.description:
My Resume

Experience

Documentor, Translator, Researcher | Project-based | 2007 - Present

Senior Developer | Freelance | 2005 - Present

  • Led development of key features
  • Mentored junior developers
  • Improved performance by 40%

Full Stack Developer | Previous Company | 2020 - 2022

  • Built web applications from scratch
  • Managed databases and APIs
  • Collaborated with design team

Education

Masters in Art History University of the Philippines

Bachelor of Fine Arts University of the Philippines

item.title: Services
item.description:
What I Offer

Documentation

Integral to the workflow in knowledge management, communication, planning, and accountability for corporate, institution, or academic work are notes, reports, transcriptions, and translation (to English) of your meetings and conferences that are clear and concise.

Web Development

Custom websites and web applications tailored to your needs.

Design

Beautiful, user-friendly UI/UX design for digital product and infographics, layout of books and magazines.

Consulting

Technical advice and strategy for your projects.
